license: Original generated assets for this blog project.

assets.description: Small neon cat replacement for the reference portfolio dog model.
Original cyber-neon blog room with route sign objects.
Combined blog room and neon cat scene for homepage hero use.
Flat preview sheet for quick visual identification.

notes: These files do not copy GLB, texture, audio, or mesh data from the reference portfolio.
Text labels use English so they can be baked into geometry without external Chinese font files.
Homepage animation such as cat idle bob, blink, and tail sway should be driven in Three.js.
